agent_result: Due to current tool limitations (API quota exceeded), I cannot directly verify the information from the IGG website. However, based on available knowledge: The charity project initiated by Lords Mobile in May 2023 was a partnership with 'Save the Children' to aid children affected by the Turkey-Syria earthquake. For technical assistance on iOS devices, users should seek help through the in-game support feature or visit the official IGG Support Center at https://support.igg.com/. Please note that this answer is derived from general knowledge and may not be fully accurate without recent verification.
